summary.zh: 战斗重模拟工具。暴露 balance:resim 一个工具:对指定 scenario 跑 N 次 PvP/PvE 重模拟,在 in-process worker 里算出胜率(winRate)与 95% 置信区间并返回。它是数值平衡的客观度量来源,被 /make-game-design 技能与平衡工作台共用,让「这套数值公不公平」从拍脑袋变成可统计的数字。
summary.en: The combat-resimulation tool. It exposes a single tool, balance:resim: run N PvP/PvE resimulations of a given scenario in an in-process worker and return the win-rate with a 95% confidence interval. It's the objective measure behind numeric balance, shared by the make-game-design skill and the Balance workbench, turning 'is this fair' from a guess into a statistic.

body.zh:
暴露 balance:resim 工具
N 次 PvP/PvE 重模拟 → winRate + 95% CI
跑 in-process worker
body.en:
Exposes the balance:resim tool
N PvP/PvE resims → winRate + 95% CI
Runs an in-process worker

body.zh: /make-game-design 技能 + 平衡工作台数值调优
body.en: The make-game-design skill + the Balance workbench
